task_completion.description: Verify the base plate is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows a flat rectangular base plate, or the Model tree view shows a Pad/Box feature corresponding to the 50x30x3 mm base.

task_completion.description: Verify at least one fin is created on the base plate
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows a thin rectangular fin (50x1x15 mm) protruding from the base plate.

task_completion.description: Verify the LinearPattern feature is used
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Model tree view (usually on the left side of the FreeCAD interface) explicitly lists a 'LinearPattern' feature.

task_completion.description: Verify exactly 6 fins are arrayed evenly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view clearly displays exactly 6 fins evenly spaced across the width of the base plate.

task_completion.description: Verify the file is saved with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar, active tab header, or a save dialog shows the filename 'heatsink.FCStd'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the FreeCAD application open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: Verify the model was built progressively
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps (e.g., sketching, padding the base, adding a fin, applying the pattern) rather than just loading a completed file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using a purely external script
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not simply write a Python script in a text editor and execute it via terminal to generate the file without opening FreeCAD (using FreeCAD's internal Python console is acceptable).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected bounding box of the final model is 50x30x18 mm (±2 mm tolerance). The expected volume is 9000 mm³ (±20% tolerance, acceptable range: 7200-10800 mm³). The model must contain exactly 6 fins. The FreeCAD tree view must show a 'LinearPattern' feature. The final file must be saved as 'heatsink.FCStd' in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.
